name: Cato SASE Cloud
description: Cato Networks SASE Cloud GraphQL API for managing security policies, network monitoring, firewall rules, and site configuration

actions.name: List Internet Firewall Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all Internet firewall policy rules (GraphQL query)

actions.name: List WAN Firewall Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all WAN firewall policy rules (GraphQL query)

actions.name: Create Internet Firewall Rule
actions.description: Create a new Internet firewall rule to block or allow traffic (GraphQL mutation)

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: InternetFirewallPolicyInput including rule name, source, destination, service, action (ALLOW/BLOCK/PROMPT_USER), and position

actions.name: Get Network Events
actions.description: Retrieve network security events and alerts (GraphQL query)

parameters.name: timeFrame
parameters.description: Time frame for events: last_hour, last_24_hours, last_7_days, last_30_days, or custom

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Event filter criteria including event type, severity, source, and destination

actions.name: List Sites
actions.description: Retrieve all sites (locations) connected to the Cato SASE cloud (GraphQL query)

actions.name: Get Site Connectivity
actions.description: Retrieve connectivity status and metrics for a specific site

parameters.name: siteId
parameters.description: ID of the site to query

actions.name: Get Traffic Statistics
actions.description: Retrieve traffic statistics including bandwidth, throughput, and usage metrics

actions.name: Block Domain
actions.description: Create an Internet firewall rule to block a specific domain or URL category
